design_philosophy: Institutional clarity. The design faithfully replicates the TUB web identity (dark blue #017cb7 and light blue #01a7f4) while providing a frictionless, F-pattern optimized dashboard for internal employees to analyze non-conformities.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding. Cards use p-6 or p-8.
layout_and_spacing.page_wrapper: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

grid_system.kpi_row: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8

header.style: bg-[#017cb7] text-white sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-md
header.nav_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 h-16 flex items-center justify-between
header.nav_links: text-white/80 hover:text-white transition-colors font-medium text-sm uppercase tracking-wide px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-white/10

kpi_card.style: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6 flex flex-col justify-between hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
kpi_card.icon_wrapper: h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-blue-50 flex items-center justify-center text-[#017cb7] mb-4

power_bi_wrapper.style: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden min-h-[700px] w-full relative

home_nav_card.style: group relative bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer h-64
home_nav_card.image_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-[#017cb7]/80 mix-blend-multiply group-hover:bg-[#017cb7]/60 transition-colors duration-300 z-10
home_nav_card.image: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover z-0 transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105
home_nav_card.content: relative p-8 h-full flex flex-col justify-end text-white z-20

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and links must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-[#01a7f4]). Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for standard interactions.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for standard UI icons (e.g., LayoutDashboard, AlertTriangle, ArrowRight, BarChart3, Activity, Clock, RotateCcw).

home_hero_bg.description: Modern city bus used for the 'Acertos' homepage navigation card.

home_card_bg_1.description: Bus interior/reflections used for the 'Trocas' homepage navigation card.

home_card_bg_2.description: Yellow bus used for the 'Faltas de Circulação' homepage navigation card.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='nav-acertos', data-testid='kpi-total-acertos').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing heavily on the TUB brand colors. Use #017cb7 for the header and #01a7f4 for active/hover navigation states.
The layout must have a sticky header with navigation to the 3 main areas: Acertos, Trocas, and Faltas de Circulação.

The homepage should feature a welcoming header text and 3 large navigation cards linking to the analytics pages. Each card should use one of the bus images provided in 'media' with a strong blue (#017cb7/80) overlay so the white text pops.

Each analytics page (Acertos, Trocas, Faltas de Circulação) must have a top row of 3-4 KPI cards (mock the data conceptually relevant to the domain) and a large, full-width container for the Power BI iframe.
MOCK the Power BI iframe by using an empty iframe with a subtle placeholder background or an embedded sample video/iframe if available, ensuring it spans min-height 700px.
Ensure the fonts Outfit (for headings) and Work Sans (for body) are imported and applied correctly.
Strictly follow the F-pattern for dashboards: Navigation top, KPIs top-left to top-right, Data/Charts below.
Include data-testid on every clickable or important element.
